extra.aggregation_note: sp.did_imputation reports an unweighted average of the per-(g,t) ATTs, while didimputation::did_imputation reports a treated-observation-weighted average (matching Borusyak-Jaravel-Spiess 2024 Section 3). On the mpdta replica sp returns -0.022 while R returns -0.035 (~36% rel gap). Both are sign-correct, both are within the published mpdta neighbourhood, and the difference is the same aggregation-rule family as the Sun-Abraham gap reported in Module 05.
